_readme: Every ID here is a BEST GUESS until verified: false flips to true after a browser check. Verify shaky:true entries first. itunes_id is the numeric trackId from the App Store URL (apps.apple.com/us/app/<slug>/id<NUMBER>). play_id is the package name from the Play URL (?id=<package>). pricing_url is the vendor pricing/plans page; render notes go in pricing_render after the week-0 static-vs-JS pass.

apps.note: IDs browser-verified 2026-07-09; guesses held. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: domain moved macrofactorapp.com->macrofactor.com; /pricing 404s; press kit is canonical public price listing ($11.99/mo, $47.99/6mo, $71.99/yr, $89.99 bundle). WordPress, likely static; confirm from first committed HTML.

apps.name: FatSecret
apps.note: IDs browser-verified 2026-07-09; guesses held. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: bare domain works, www 404s. Page shows NO prices by design (region/currency varies, app-only). Kept for feature-table/FAQ diffs. Price signal = store IAP strings (A.2).

apps.name: MyNetDiary
apps.note: IDs browser-verified 2026-07-09; guesses held. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: comparison article w/ self-declared as-of date (may lag). Prices: $59.99/yr Premium, $99.99/yr Plus, $8.99/mo, $179.99 lifetime. Also asserts MyFitnessPal prices.

apps.note: IDs browser-verified 2026-07-09; guesses held. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: pricing app-only (help-center article only; not a stable diff target). 7-day trial. Price signal = store IAP strings.

apps.note: Both IDs corrected. Dev: Caliber Fitness Inc on both stores. Verified 2026-07-09. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: domain moved caliberstrong.com->caliberfitness.com. Coaching prices quote-only; payment-options page shows methods not amounts. App tier price = store IAP strings.

apps.name: Gymaholic
apps.note: iTunes corrected to 648518560 (dev: Devenyi Gabor). Play ABSENT: vendor site claims Android but no findable official US Play listing; com.gymaholic.training is unconfirmed-identity (different name/icon/dev field, 10K installs) — do not add. Verified 2026-07-09. | Pricing pass 2026-07-10: prices shown ($6.50/mo Plus, $5.25/mo Premium) but page is sale-driven: countdown timer, campaign banners, strikethrough list prices. Expect campaign-churn diffs; normalization-tuning candidate. Do NOT append ?plan= params.
